title: Migrate test suite off literal translated strings
objective: Update test assertions that hardcode literal translated strings to use data-testid/role-based queries where translation content isn't the point of the test, keeping literal assertions only where verifying translation is the test's purpose.

include: Audit App.test.tsx, noiseCutApi.test.ts, reportMarkdown.test.ts for literal-string assertions.
Switch non-translation-focused assertions to data-testid/role-based queries.
Consolidate translation-content assertions near the relevant feature tests.
exclude: Component behavior changes to make tests pass.

done: Translation-content tests keep literal assertions, consolidated appropriately.
Full test suite passes at the same or better coverage.
AI delivery state is updated, and Phase 003 slice status marked Completed.
